what: Every experimental signal and its gate. mode=observe means it influences NOTHING until real shadow evidence clears the promotion rule — the operator's own spec: no feature affects judgment before it proves it is edge, not noise.

news_signals.promote_rule: shadow hit-rate beats coin-flip at p<0.05 over min_samples

dr_strange.promote_rule: projection direction beats baseline drift over min_samples

lifecycle.promote_rule: state-conditioned MR beats unconditioned MR net-of-fees
